auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Aaron Keetley, CPA, CA, CMA - Port Coquitlam)
one_time_description: Land compensation payments in Lands and Economic Development department; also large Province of BC funding of $3,033,174 in that department suggesting non-recurring land-related transfers
economic_notes: Band has interests in SEM Holdings Ltd. (20%), Pelltiq't Energy Group Ltd. (25%), Kenpesq't Limited Partnership (99.99%), Kenpesq't GP Ltd. (100%), Kenpesq't Territorial Operations Ltd. (100%), BCFN GRS GP Ltd., and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership. Received BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing of $295,833. Forestry services revenue through Kinbasket Development Corporation. Water and sewer operations through Kinbasket Water & Sewer Company Ltd. Dispute with Shuswap Woodlands Restoration Ltd. for $249,746.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on multiple bases: (1) financial information for certain nation business entities (SEM Holdings Ltd., North Rock Holdings) not available; (2) $600,000 advance to related entity from unrelated third party may not be collectable; (3) sub-leased land rights carried at fair value not in accordance with PSAS; (4) deferred revenue includes $2,451,849 appraisal increase on sub-leased land rights not in accordance with PSAS. Three entities fully consolidated: Kinbasket Development Corporation, Kinbasket Property Development Corporation, Kinbasket Water and Sewer Company Ltd. Five entities accounted for by modified equity method. Prior period adjustment of $51,566 applied to 2019 comparative figures. Large spike in Province of BC revenue ($5,822,088 vs $2,536,005 prior year) driven largely by $3,033,174 in Lands and Economic Development and $1,085,776 in Territorial; also $1,689,083 in land compensation payments. FCRSA revenue of $1,640,740 included in First Nation GST/FCRSA schedule but consolidated revenue line shows only $732,105 for First Nation GST/FCRSA - the FCRSA portion may be netted or allocated differently. expenses_salaries_total estimated from department wage line totals. expenses_enterprises represents sum of Kinbasket Development Corporation ($196,971), Kinbasket Water and Sewer Corporation ($701,499), Kinbasket Property Development Corporation (-$20), CMHC Section 96 Housing ($34,593). Non-Profit Housing Fund and Trust Fund schedules referenced but full text not included in extract. No schedule of remuneration provided.
